text.title: Billable vs Internal Allocation Split Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) pinning the shape of a valid Billable vs Internal Allocation Split `decision-record` artefact. The validator script enforces this contract before downstream consumption.

example.note: artefact_id is not kebab-case; owner is `team` (forbidden); decision is empty; inputs_used is empty; version is not semver; required `decision-record`-shape fields are missing.

list.item: owner ∈ { team, we, us, engineering, empty }
rationale that does not cite any input by name
inputs_used is empty AND decision is not `no-op`
duplicate artefact_id within the same artefact store

text.reference: Validator script enforcing the schema + forbidden patterns.
